title: inga macrostachys
intro: Inga macrostachys, also known as the "Guamachil" or "Inga tree", is a species of flowering plant in the family Leguminosae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Inga macrostachys include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used to make teas, capsules, and topical creams for its medicinal and therapeutic benefits.
